calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion to compel answers to post-judgment discovery granted as follows:
a. All objections are waived, except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within ten days of the date of service of this order, defendant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's post-judgment request for production of documents (set one); and post-judgment interrogatories (set one);
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
